meta.title: HELIX build: one bounded implementation pass against a governing bead

narration: Planning is done. A runtime hands the skill a specific bead; build mode runs one bounded implementation pass against the artifacts that govern it.

prompt: Use HELIX build mode on bead-001 (CSV header sniffer) in .ddx/beads.jsonl. Read the bead's governing artifacts and acceptance criteria, then execute one bounded implementation pass: write the header sniffer tests, the implementation, and the schema-mapping.yaml. Do not broaden scope beyond bead-001.

tool_result: bead-001: CSV header sniffer · acceptance: schema-mapping.yaml exists; 3 fixtures; go test passes; OWASP A03 clean

assistant: Acceptance is concrete. Writing tests first against the three fixtures, then the implementation that makes them pass, then the YAML US-INGEST-3 requires.

tool_result: 3 payer mappings (acme, beta, gamma); strict KnownFields decoding
3 fixtures: acme exact-match · beta case-insensitive + reordered · unknown headers → error

narration: The acceptance contract is the gate. Now run it.

assistant:
Bead-001 complete. Acceptance verified:

- schema-mapping.yaml at project root — adding a new payer is YAML-only per US-INGEST-3.
- tests/header_sniffer_test.go — 3 fixtures: acme exact-match, beta case-insensitive + reordered, unknown headers → error.
- go test ./... passes; go vet clean.
- OWASP A03 (Injection) — scoped gosec scan returns 0 issues. No exec, no SQL, no template render.

Note: default gosec also flags G304 (path traversal in LoadMapping) — that's CWE-22 / OWASP A01, outside this bead's acceptance. Surfacing for a separate hardening bead.

Scope held to bead-001; bead-002 (validator) and bead-004 (CLI) untouched.

narration: One bead, one bounded pass. The skill stayed inside the governing artifacts; the runtime decides what comes next.
